zh.Coaltown of Wemyss, Fife, Scotland, Unit: 英國蘇格蘭費伏維梅斯

zh.lifeSummary: Michael Wemyss - Lord of Wemyss是Sir William de Lochore of that Ilk, Knight的兒子，於1295年出生在蘇格蘭費伏維梅斯。他於1315年與Margaret Drumry - Heiress of Lochore在蘇格蘭費伏維梅斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1342年在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏維梅斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Michael Wemyss - Lord of Wemyss是Sir William de Lochore of that Ilk, Knight的儿子，于1295年出生在苏格兰費伏維梅斯。他于1315年与Margaret Drumry - Heiress of Lochore在苏格兰費伏維梅斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1342年在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏維梅斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wemyss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Wemyss in Fife, traditionally pronounced ‘weems’. The placename is from Gaelic uaimh ‘cave’ + the placename forming suffix –es. The surname reached Ireland in the 14th century, see Wims .

variants.name: Wims
meanings: Irish: variant of Scottish   Wemyss  , representing the usual pronunciation of that Scottish name.

variants.name: Weems
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Wemyss  , reflecting the usual pronunciation of that name.

History: David Weems (Wemyss) emigrated from Scotland to Herring Bay, Anne Arundel County, MD, some time before 1722. Mason Locke Weems, born near Herring Bay in 1759, was a clergyman who wrote a biography of George Washington, in which the first account of the cherry-tree story appeared.

variants.name: Wymbs
meanings: Irish: variant of Scottish   Wemyss  . Compare   Wims  .

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: Michael Wemyss - Lord of Wemyss was born in 1295, in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland as the son of Sir William de Lochore of that Ilk, Knight. He married Margaret Drumry - Heiress of Lochore in 1315, in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1342, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Michael Wemyss - Lord of Wemyss est né en 1295, à Wemyss, Fife, Écosse, fils de Sir William de Lochore of that Ilk, Knight. Il a épousé Margaret Drumry - Heiress of Lochore en 1315, à Wemyss, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1342, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Wemyss, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Michael Wemyss - Lord of Wemyss wurde 1295 in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland, als Sohn von Sir William de Lochore of that Ilk, Knight geboren. Er hat 1315 in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland Margaret Drumry - Heiress of Lochore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1342 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Michael Wemyss - Lord of Wemyss è nato il nel 1295 nel Wemyss, Fife, Scotland come figlio di Sir William de Lochore of that Ilk, Knight. Lui sposato Margaret Drumry - Heiress of Lochore nel 1315, nel Wemyss, Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1342, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Wemyss, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Michael Wemyss - Lord of Wemyssは1295年にスコットランドフィフウエムイスでSir William de Lochore of that Ilk, Knightの息子として生まれた。1315年にスコットランドフィフウエムイスでMargaret Drumry - Heiress of Lochoreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1342年に故郷で47歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフウエムイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Michael Wemyss - Lord of Wemyss(은)는 1295년 스컷랜드 피프 w미스에서 Sir William de Lochore of that Ilk, Knight의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1315년 스컷랜드 피프 w미스에서 Margaret Drumry - Heiress of Lochore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1342년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 w미스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Michael Wemyss - Lord of Wemyss nasceu em 1295, em Wemyss, Fife, Scotland filho de Sir William de Lochore of that Ilk, Knight. Ele casou-se com Margaret Drumry - Heiress of Lochore em 1315, em Wemyss, Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1342, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Wemyss, Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Michael Wemyss - Lord of Wemyss родился в 1295 г. в местности вемисс, фиф, Шотландия. Его отца звали Sir William de Lochore of that Ilk, Knight. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Drumry - Heiress of Lochore в 1315 г. в местности вемисс, фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1342 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности вемисс, фиф, Шотландия.

sm.1316 - 1322: mai le 1316 e o'o I le 1322

es.lifeSummary: Michael Wemyss - Lord of Wemyss nació en 1295, en Wemyss, Fife, Scotland como hijo de Sir William de Lochore of that Ilk, Knight. Se casó con Margaret Drumry - Heiress of Lochore en 1315, en Wemyss, Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1342, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Wemyss, Fife, Scotland.
